chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2597 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of main case 06.09.2023 Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Kamaluddin advocate for respondents No.2 and 3. ----- In terms of the Minutes of the 17th Meeting of the Departmental Promotion Committee in terms of Resolution No.17.4 petitioner’s has been recommended as his name appears at serial No.1. It was then approved by the Vice-Chancellor. However, it seems to have been pending for its effectiveness / compliance on account of pendency of this petition. It appears that this petition has served its purpose as only prayer made in this petition was that he may be considered on merits and on seniority for his promotion. He was not only considered but recommended in terms of the Minutes referred above. Petition has served its purpose and is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
